title: Smartphones, Tablets, and Wearables
text:
Smartphones, Tablets, and Wearables

Unlock Market Insights

Gain in-depth knowledge of the mobile device industry with TechInsights' comprehensive coverage on smartphones, tablets, and wearables. Our analysis includes supply and demand tracking, market dynamics, and trend forecasts, along with detailed smartphone and tablet model specifications and teardown insights. Leverage our research to de-risk strategic investments, identify emerging trends, uncover market gaps, optimize pricing strategies, and capitalize on cutting-edge mobile innovations.

With TechInsights, you can precisely target markets, manage risks, and stay ahead of the competition.

Get Started

Managing Cost and Risk

Our wide range of reports and analyses will help business and technology leadership derisk strategic investment and procurement decisions with visibility into mobile device manufacturing, demand, and inventory risk management.

Key Features

Monthly Mobile Device Inventory Monitoring and Tracking: Our monthly smartphone shipments, sales, and inventory tracking database will help you navigate and manage inventory risk.
Top-Tier Mobile Device Industry Supply and Demand Forecast: The top and granular mobile device forecast data and analyses covers vendor, region, country, distribution channel, installed base, user base, replacement rate, and penetration rate ensures you can identify all unaddressed segments and take action to monetize as opportunities arise.
Historical Data: Our long-term tracking data covers the past 20 years, allowing us to grasp and summarize critical historical patterns and lessons with in-depth analysis and advice, which helps our clients derisk strategic investment and procurement decisions.
Mobile Device Teardown and BOM Cost Analysis: Our competitive smartphone and mobile device teardown and BOM cost analysis and information provides our clients with the valuable competitive information to evaluate and manage procurement and cost risks.
New and Enabling Technology Analysis and Forecast: Our enabling technology tracks and forecast across the whole mobile industry from upper stream semiconductor and component to new enabling technologies such as generative AI on device, as well as mobile device and mobile operator service offering by air interface (4G /5G etc.). It will help our clients to navigate the fast-changing technology innovation and evolution, avoid mis-stepping any mega trends in the next five to ten years.

Targeting Markets

Our research reveals where market share, market gaps, and unaddressed customer pain points lie, so you can bridge those gaps and position your product accordingly.

Comprehensive Smartphone Hardware Specification Database: Our meticulous approach covers thousands of smartphone models across all major markets with key hardware specifications and product teardown analyses and information.
Detailed and Granular Smartphone Price Tier Tracking and Forecast Data: Our unrivaled smartphone price tier by unit, ASP and revenue data helps our clients track key competitors’ roadmaps and identify the unaddressed market segments.

Top-Tier Smartphone Industry Supply and Demand Forecast: The top and granular smartphone forecast data and analyses covering vendor, region, country, distribution channel, installed base, user base, replacement rate, and penetration rate ensure you can identify all unaddressed segments and take actions to monetize opportunities that arise.
New and Enabling Technology Analysis and Forecast: Benefit from thorough evaluations of market share and semiconductor supply within the consumer electronics sector, along with cross-company and generational comparisons, to inform innovation and competitive strategies.

 

Make Smarter Mobile Device Decisions

 

Smartphones, Tablets, and Wearables from TechInsights enables your business to precisely target markets and manage risks.

 

Unlock Market Insights

Request a Demo

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in TechInsights' Smartphones, Tablets, and Wearables coverage?

Our coverage includes detailed supply and demand tracking, market dynamics, trend forecasts, and model-level specifications for smartphones and tablets. We also provide teardown analyses, competitive benchmarking, and insights on emerging technologies like generative AI on devices and mobile operator services.

How can TechInsights' research help my business?

Our research enables businesses to make informed decisions by providing visibility into mobile device manufacturing, demand, inventory risk management, and market trends. We help you identify emerging opportunities, optimize pricing strategies, and mitigate risks in your procurement and investment strategies.

What types of data and reports are available?

TechInsights offers a range of reports, including monthly mobile device inventory monitoring, detailed supply and demand forecasts, teardown and BOM cost analysis, historical data, and enabling technology analysis. These reports are designed to help you understand market share, pricing trends, and technology advancements in the mobile device industry.

How does TechInsights track mobile device market trends?

We use extensive data collection methods and advanced analytics to monitor smartphone shipments, sales, inventory, and market trends. Our top-tier forecasts cover various factors, including vendor performance, regional and country-specific insights, distribution channels, and installed user bases.

What is the value of mobile device teardown analysis?

Our teardown analyses provide in-depth insights into the components, cost structure, and design of mobile devices. This helps businesses assess competitive advantages, optimize procurement decisions, and manage cost risks effectively.

How does TechInsights support strategic investment decisions?

Our reports and analyses offer critical visibility into mobile device manufacturing, demand trends, and inventory risks. With our comprehensive data, you can confidently make strategic investment and procurement decisions, mitigate risks, and identify market gaps that could lead to new opportunities.

How does TechInsights help with pricing strategy?

We provide granular data on smartphone price tiers, unit sales, ASP (Average Selling Price), and revenue. Our pricing data helps businesses track competitors' roadmaps and uncover unaddressed market segments, enabling you to optimize your pricing strategy and improve profitability.

Can I access historical data on mobile device trends?

Yes, TechInsights offers over 20 years of historical tracking data. This extensive archive helps businesses identify long-term market patterns, evaluate past trends, and apply valuable insights to future strategic decisions.

How often are your reports updated?

We update our reports monthly to provide the latest data on smartphone shipments, sales, inventory, and market dynamics. This ensures that our clients have access to the most current and relevant information for decision-making.

How can I get started with TechInsights?

To get started, simply sign up or contact our team to request a demo or a subscription. Our experts will guide you through the best reports and tools for your needs, helping you leverage our research to achieve your business goals.
